artifacts.notes: Existing Strategy1 briefing used as the current authoritative context artifact while formal spec and mapping artifacts were backfilled.
Superseded by strategy1_spec_v1.1.0 after founder changed Strategy1 timeframe contract on 2026-03-25.
Superseded by strategy1_mapping_v1.1.0 after founder changed Strategy1 timeframe contract on 2026-03-25.

Founder-approved Strategy1 contract refresh: default 1day with optional 1min/5min/15min and restart-required timeframe changes. Superseded by Strategy1 v1.2.0 on 2026-03-27 after founder added VWAP-gated entry and manual position correction requirements.

Stage 2 now includes: immediate daily_30d validation, replay-only performance stats, daily and intraday validation charts on TradingView Lightweight Charts, session drill-down linked from monthly replay, session payload separation of manual override exits from normal Strategy1 parity inputs, stable daily-anchor handling for manual_stop exits, and a completed-daily historical replay path for daily_30d validation. Remaining remediation before PR approval: gap-safe 5min/15min aggregation and timeframe/restart-required visibility on the main dashboard strategy surface. Superseded by Strategy1 v1.2.0 on 2026-03-27 after founder added VWAP-gated entry and manual position correction requirements.

Founder-approved Strategy1 v1.2.0 contract: daily decision window moves to 15:00-15:15 IST, VWAP gates BUY entries across all timeframes, and manual position correction becomes an audited workflow with manual trade recording.

Senior Backend acknowledged Strategy1 v1.2.0 mapping on 2026-03-27. Stage 2 implementation now includes VWAP-gated Strategy1 runtime evaluation, 15:00-15:15 IST daily decision timing, minute-based monthly daily replay, per-day VWAP gate/source diagnostics for daily validation, validation-page non-blank chart/error states for degraded replay data, replay candidate-signal visibility when VWAP is unavailable, session-scoped VWAP handling that prevents stale prior-day VWAP reuse, mismatch detection/manual-correction APIs, validation-page VWAP plus mismatch visibility, a read-only main-dashboard operator cockpit backed by a unified dashboard-surface API with live 1-minute candles/session VWAP/runtime state/order and signal tapes/manual corrections/mismatch banner/restart-required visibility, local dashboard startup hardening via a self-contained Docker image, maintenance fallback page, staged start-dev orchestration, and a corrected local service-image build path that intentionally reuses the root workspace node_modules for paper/dev speed while the dashboard remains self-contained. Remaining Stage 2 blockers before Stage 3 review: 5min/15min bucket completeness checks and operator-facing manual correction submission UI.
